message:
refactor(scheduler): simplify CancelSession/CancelBatch with single-pass retain pattern

Replace the fragile reverse-index heap.Remove loop in CancelSession
and CancelBatch with a single-pass retain/discard pattern that
rebuilds the heap via heap.Init, eliminating reverse-order removal
complexity and only touching stats counters when cancellations
actually occurred.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
